name: Orchard Glassfruit
riskNotes: Spoils on long routes, attracts civilian priority scans, low pirate interest
lore: A sweet translucent fruit grown in orbital ribbon farms around Orchard Meridian. Mostly bought by stations that want to feel more human than industrial.

name: Veilrun Blue Vapor
riskNotes: Volatile if overheated, unstable under repeated boost shocks
lore: Condensed atmospheric harvest pulled from gas giant upper layers and used in coolant mixes, specialty fuel additives, and industrial chemistry.

name: Needlecore Ore
riskNotes: Heavy, low value-to-weight, boring enough to be safe until you haul a lot of it
lore: Dense structural ore extracted from prospect shafts like Needle Prospect. Essential, unglamorous, always in demand.

name: Bale Furnace Bricks
riskNotes: Heavy load reduces maneuverability, often shipped in bulk
lore: Heat-resistant industrial lining bricks from Cinder Bale Works, used in refinery overhauls and emergency patching.

name: Helio Medfoam Kits
riskNotes: High lawful scan priority, escort recommended in contested lanes
lore: Rapid-seal trauma foam packs made at Helio Ward. Legitimate, lifesaving, and therefore stolen constantly.

name: Pelican Standard Shells
riskNotes: Cheap but bulky, best in return-cargo loops
lore: Empty freight shells designed for modular reuse. Nobody loves shipping them, everyone needs them.

name: Meridian Spice Dust
riskNotes: Fragile aroma seal, customs-friendly but highly marked up
lore: A fragrant culinary powder from farm satellites that turns boring station food into something people discuss on purpose.

name: Hollow Ledger Slates
riskNotes: Data corruption risk if exposed to ion arcs
lore: Hardened archival slates used for route law, manifests, and signed logistics records.

name: Bracket Home Textiles
riskNotes: Low risk, stable, good beginner cargo
lore: Civilian fabric rolls woven for station interiors, uniforms, blankets, and practical gifts.

name: Aureline Seal Tags
riskNotes: Targeted by smugglers and counterfeiters
lore: Authenticated customs tags used to verify legal cargo movement through formal routes.

name: Choir Condensate
riskNotes: Scanner static can damage container reporting; mildly volatile
lore: Nebula-born condensate harvested from Choir Dust, prized for advanced sensing gels and premium coolant compounds.

name: Lantern Hearts
riskNotes: Sensitive to impact, emotionally valued by some communities
lore: Recovered beacon cores from old route markers. Technically components, culturally closer to public memory.

name: Bubblewake Gas Pearls
riskNotes: Delicate pressure shell, cargo shock risk
lore: Dense gas nodules collected from drifting pockets in Bubblewake Reach. Used in high-end lab work and odd drinks.

name: Oxblood Ferrite
riskNotes: Pirate interest medium, bulk shipments common ambush targets
lore: Red mineral concentrate from Oxblood Mile, useful in hull reinforcement and field plating.

name: Mica Vault Preserves
riskNotes: Rare stock, usually mission-linked, attracts thieves
lore: Long-stored reserve foods and sealed cultural goods recovered from forgotten vault systems.

name: Chapel Wax Cells
riskNotes: Small-value cargo, but popular on long-haul supply lines
lore: Compact low-tech light cells and heat candles used where elegance matters more than output.

name: Snare Scrap Bundles
riskNotes: Messy cargo, may trigger salvage claim disputes
lore: Reclaimed mixed-metal bundles skimmed from fast debris currents and sold for reprocessing.

name: Taxonomy Bio-Seals
riskNotes: Strict handling protocols, spoilage if seal breaks
lore: Containment and lab transport seals designed for unusual specimen handling.

name: Hive Patch Resin
riskNotes: Sticky, awkward, but stable
lore: A fast-bond repair resin sold heavily around The Hive. Not pretty, extremely useful.

name: Far Lantern Seedlocks
riskNotes: Must stay cold, very high heritage value
lore: Preserved colony seed canisters and botanical lineage stock from the Far Lantern wreck.

name: Brine Halo Salts
riskNotes: Moisture-sensitive packaging, pirate interest moderate
lore: Coolant-grade mineral salts skimmed from the Brine Halo's white particulate ring.

name: Frostbite Cryocrystals
riskNotes: Fracture risk under hard turns, prized and heavily insured
lore: Exotic crystal forms harvested near Frostbite Lantern, used in sensors, medicine, and advanced refrigeration.

name: Graywake Power Cartridges
riskNotes: High demand in blackout regions, moderate theft risk
lore: Durable emergency cells designed to restore power to dead rings, dark docks, and failing relays.

name: Char Archive Memory Racks
riskNotes: Data theft risk extreme, fragile to thermal spikes
lore: Hardened memory assemblies recovered from burnt archives and tribunal stations.

name: Velvet Spill Filter Mesh
riskNotes: Illegal variants exist, inspection interest elevated
lore: Specialized filtration mesh needed for operations in murky nebula fields and contaminated cloud pockets.

name: Sable Blackroute Ink
riskNotes: Illegal in formal lanes, attracts pirate and customs attention alike
lore: A stealth-tagging compound used to falsify route stamps, repaint IDs, and hide cargo lineage.

name: Crown Lattice Shards
riskNotes: Razor-edged cargo, loading injury risk
lore: High-value crystal fragments from Crown of Splinters, essential for precision optics and decorative wealth.

name: Last Cordial Soup Bricks
riskNotes: Time-sensitive only in terms of dignity; morale value unusually high
lore: Dense flavor bricks boiled into the station's famous long-haul soup. Objectively practical, spiritually critical.

name: Warden Plating Segments
riskNotes: Heavy and high-priority in dangerous sectors
lore: Modular armor segments salvaged from defense outposts and repurposed for hard frontier infrastructure.

name: Debt Relay Packet Cores
riskNotes: Illegal to inspect without authority, heavily targeted by thieves
lore: Encrypted settlement cores carrying debt ledgers, route leverage, and quiet leverage over loud people.
